3CX Live Chat & Talk

Connecting talent, accelerating growth.

Eximious is a global outsourcing solution for Recruitment, Compliance, Finance, and Accounting.

Book a free consultation

Schedule here

Candidate sourcing can be challenging without a clear strategy. Eximious Global provides excellence in every step, from initial sourcing to onboarding. With over 20 years of industry expertise, we deliver effective permanent and contract recruiting as your trusted offshore partner.

Partnered with 132 organisations across 15 countries.

Truly global

Eximious Values

Integrity

We are transparent with clients about our capabilities, fostering partnerships where clients understand the value and services our team delivers.

Accountability

The best partnerships are rooted in accountability and keeping each other ‘in the loop’ with feedback and opinions.

Versatility

Our adaptable business model aligns with each client’s needs. With niche expertise and deep market understanding across regions, we provide tailored solutions.

Excellence

We’re trusted advisors to clients because we prioritize excellence in every step. From team training to client care, we ensure that clients, candidates, and employees understand the importance of an excellent service.

Partnership

We see ourselves as an extension of your organization, aligning with your values and culture to find the ideal fit.

Inclusion

Our global team brings inclusivity to everything we do. By embracing diverse perspectives and experiences, we build sharp, cohesive teams that support our clients' growth plans and vision.

Eximious Values

Integrity

We are transparent with clients about our capabilities, fostering partnerships where clients understand the value and services our team delivers.

Accountability

The best partnerships are rooted in accountability and keeping each other ‘in the loop’ with feedback and opinions.

Excellence

We’re trusted advisors to clients because we prioritize excellence in every step. From team training to client care, we ensure that clients, candidates, and employees understand the importance of an excellent service.

Partnership

We see ourselves as an extension of your organization, aligning with your values and culture to find the ideal fit.

Versatility

Our adaptable business model aligns with each client’s needs. With niche expertise and deep market understanding across regions, we provide tailored solutions.

Inclusion

Our global team brings inclusivity to everything we do. By embracing diverse perspectives and experiences, we build sharp, cohesive teams that support our clients' growth plans and vision.

The business model we adopt aligns us with each client and their bespoke needs. This means that our teams have niche expertise, as well as a comprehensive and in-depth understanding of core markets across geographies.

What We Do

Recruitment Process Outsourcing

Our RPO services encompass a comprehensive suite of solutions tailored to meet your unique hiring needs. From talent sourcing and screening to candidate assessment and onboarding, we provide end-to-end recruitment support. Our data-driven approach ensures that we deliver high-quality candidates efficiently, resulting in reduced time-to-fill and increased hiring success.

Sourcing the Best Candidates

At Eximious Global, we have invested decades catering to clients with a wide spectrum of industries. In effect, we have built an unmatchable global network. Our team comprises both experience and expertise to understand the needs of our clients. After carefully assessing their requirements, we provide them with the best RPO solutions.

learn more

Full Cycle Recruitment

Eximious Global provides comprehensive recruitment solutions, covering everything from sourcing and interviewing candidates to negotiating offers, onboarding and training. Our end-to-end services not only ensure quality maintenance but also streamline the hiring process. By managing the full cycle, we help our clients focus on ensuring company culture, policy and other compliance.

learn more

Payroll & Accounts Outsourcing

As our services streamline financial operations, they extend tailor-made financial management solutions that are not only reliable and efficient but also cost-effective. Handling payroll processing, tax filings, bookkeeping, and financial reporting, our expert team leverages advanced technology and best practices.

learn more

Administrative Support

Eximious Global manages daily financial transactions including recording sales, purchases, receipts, and payments. Ensuring accurate and up-to-date financial records, we foster smoother financial audits with a clear view of our client’s financial health.

learn more

Executive Search

Eximious Global conducts in-depth market research to discreetly approach potential candidates and perform thorough assessments to ensure a strategic fit with the company’s culture and objectives. Both our extensive networks and expertise in executive placements help businesses secure high-caliber leaders to allow organisations to focus on their core activities.

learn more

Out of Hours

Our Out-of-Hours (OOH) Service ensures your agency operates seamlessly during evenings, weekends, and holidays. From last-minute bookings to managing escalations and cancellations, our experienced team acts as an extension of your agency, delivering speed, precision, and professionalism. Let us handle the night shift hustle, ensuring client satisfaction while you focus on growing your agency stress-free. With Eximious, success never sleeps!

learn more

Compliance

At Eximious Global, healthcare compliance isn’t just a task—it’s our commitment. We understand the complexities of healthcare regulations and how crucial compliance is for nursing agencies. Our compliance experts ensure that every detail is meticulously handled, from candidate onboarding to maintaining accurate and up-to-date documentation. With a proactive approach, we minimize risks, safeguard your reputation, and keep you audit-ready at all times. Leave the compliance burden to us and focus on what you do best—providing excellent care

learn more
